name: wilson-decision-gate
description: Step-by-step decision gate — multi-decision work is one user-confirmation gate per decision, never batched: for each branch point present options + recommendation + rationale (3+ bullets), wait for the pick, then record a `### Decision N` block in design.md. Standalone port of wilson's principle-step-by-step-decision-gate (text-only, like wilson; CC hooks can't detect batching either). SessionStart **and PostCompact** inject the principle (PostCompact lands in the clean post-summary context — the rules survive compaction); UserPromptSubmit adds a short reminder ONLY when the prompt looks like branch-point work (not every prompt). Gate presentation **auto-inherits the active wilson-prefs response style** (read cross-plugin from its well-known data dir; graceful no-op when prefs is absent) — friendly ⇒ the full 7-element pattern, no manual reminder. /wilson-decision-gate maintains the design.md ledger; `decide` rationale splits on top-level `;`/`·` only (a `;` inside `(...)` no longer over-splits a bullet; `\;` is a literal). Ships a 5-language canonical sample. An active native `/goal` flips the gate into autonomy mode — adopt the recommendation, log it, and continue instead of stopping for a pick (the `/goal` is standing authorization; PreToolUse safety guards still fire). Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_DECISION_GATE.
